title: tilia platyphyllos proles spectabilis
intro: Tilia platyphyllos proles spectabilis, also known as Large-leaved Lime or Spectabilis Lime, is a variety of the Tilia platyphyllos tree, native to Europe and Asia. The leaves, flowers, and young shoots of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and tannins. The health benefits of Tilia platyphyllos proles spectabilis include its ability to calm the nervous system, reduce anxiety and stress, and provide relief from insomnia and restlessness. Herbal preparations of Tilia platyphyllos proles spectabilis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
